steps.t: Naeglanc is at Echad Naeglanc, west of the cairns where Mair is posted. Mair has asked you to speak with Naeglanc regarding the remnants of the vessel…
Lhucu's hut sits upon a ridge west of Echad Naeglanc, between Lhan Gogledh and Lhan Bach. Naeglanc suggested that you speak with Lhucu, daughter of Tr…
